name: Guasacaca (Barbecue Sauce from Venezuela)
recipeIngredient: 1 Chile, habanero, seeded and stemmed, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. With a mortar and pestle, mash the onion, garlic, chile, avocado, and tomatoes into a paste. This may need to be done in batches.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and blend well with a fork.
3. This sauce contains fresh avocado and therefore must be used immediately and cannot be stored. Use it to marinate and/or baste grilled or barbecued shrimp, beef, or chicken.
